offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes cash flow gaps. We automate cash flow forecasting instead of manual cash flow forecasting using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate cash flow forecasts due to manual data entry.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for initial setup and weekly cash flow report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Develop a demo video showcasing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
